home.headline: Design Your Kanban System
home.intro: Build a Kanban board from scratch or start from one of 10 pre-built templates based on real-world archetypes. Configure WIP limits, swim lanes, and understand the rationale behind each design choice.
home.wipText: WIP (Work In Progress) limits are the key mechanism in Kanban that creates pull-based flow. Little's Law states: Cycle Time = WIP ÷ Throughput. By limiting WIP you reduce cycle time and surface bottlenecks. Start with WIP = (team size × 1.5) per stage and adjust based on observation.
